info.name: PromptOps API
info.description:
Complete API collection for PromptOps - an AI agent evaluation and management platform.

## Authentication
Most endpoints require a Bearer token. Use the `/auth/login` or `/auth/register` endpoints to obtain a token.

## Workspace Context
Agent and Evaluation routes require a `workspaceId` path parameter to scope operations to a specific workspace.

item.name: 🏥 Health

request.description:
Simple health check endpoint. No authentication required.

**Response:** `{ "status": "ok" }`

item.description: Health check endpoints for monitoring server status.

item.name: 🔐 Auth

request.description:
Register a new user account.

**Validation:**
- `name`: Required, min 1 character
- `email`: Required, valid email format
- `password`: Required, min 8 characters

**Success (201):** Returns user object and JWT token
**Error (409):** Email already exists

Authenticate with email and password.

**Success (200):** Returns user object and JWT token
**Error (401):** Invalid email or password

item.description: Authentication endpoints for user registration and login. These endpoints do not require authentication.

item.name: 🏢 Workspaces

request.description:
Create a new workspace. The creating user becomes the OWNER.

**Validation:**
- `name`: Required, 1-255 characters

**Success (201):** Returns workspace object

List all workspaces the authenticated user belongs to.

**Success (200):** Returns array of workspaces with role info

Delete a workspace and all associated data.

**Permission:** OWNER only

**Success (204):** No content
**Error (403):** Access denied
**Error (404):** Workspace not found

List all members of a workspace.

**Permission:** Any workspace member

**Success (200):** Returns array of members with roles

Invite a user to the workspace by email.

**Permission:** OWNER or ADMIN

**Body:**
- `email`: Required, valid email
- `role`: Optional, one of `OWNER`, `ADMIN`, `USER` (default: USER)

**Success (201):** Returns member object
**Error (400):** User not found or already member

Change a user's role in the workspace.

**Permission:** OWNER only

**Body:**
- `role`: Required, one of `OWNER`, `ADMIN`, `USER`

**Success (200):** Returns updated member object
**Error (400):** Cannot change own role or invalid operation

item.description: Workspace management endpoints. All require authentication.

item.name: 🤖 Agents

request.description:
Create a new agent in the workspace.

**Permission:** OWNER or ADMIN

**Body:**
- `name`: Required, 1-255 characters
- `description`: Optional, max 1000 characters

**Success (201):** Returns agent object

List all agents in the workspace.

**Permission:** Any workspace member

**Success (200):** Returns array of agents

Get a single agent by ID.

**Permission:** Any workspace member

**Success (200):** Returns agent object
**Error (404):** Agent not found

Update an agent's details.

**Permission:** OWNER or ADMIN

**Body:** (all optional)
- `name`: 1-255 characters
- `description`: max 1000 characters

**Success (200):** Returns updated agent
**Error (404):** Agent not found

Delete an agent and all its versions.

**Permission:** OWNER only

**Success (204):** No content
**Error (404):** Agent not found

Create a new version for an agent.

**Permission:** OWNER or ADMIN

**Body:**
- `systemInstruction`: Required, the system prompt
- `config`: Required, configuration object (model, temperature, etc.)

**Success (201):** Returns version object
**Error (404):** Agent not found

List all versions of an agent.

**Permission:** Any workspace member

**Success (200):** Returns array of versions
**Error (404):** Agent not found

Set which version is the active/production version for an agent.

**Permission:** OWNER or ADMIN

**Body:**
- `versionId`: Required, ID of the version to activate

**Success (200):** Returns updated agent
**Error (400):** Version not found or doesn't belong to agent
**Error (404):** Agent not found

item.description: Agent management endpoints. All require authentication and workspace membership.

item.name: 📊 Evaluations

request.description:
Create a new evaluation definition.

**Permission:** OWNER or ADMIN

**Body:**
- `name`: Optional, max 255 characters
- `scope`: Required, `WORKSPACE` or `AGENT`
- `agentId`: Required if scope is `AGENT`
- `definition`: Required, evaluation criteria object

**Success (201):** Returns definition object
**Error (400):** Validation error

List all evaluation definitions in the workspace.

**Permission:** Any workspace member

**Success (200):** Returns array of definitions

Get a single evaluation definition by ID.

**Permission:** Any workspace member

**Success (200):** Returns definition object
**Error (404):** Definition not found

Update an evaluation definition.

**Permission:** OWNER or ADMIN

**Body:** (all optional)
- `name`: max 255 characters
- `scope`: `WORKSPACE` or `AGENT`
- `agentId`: integer or null
- `definition`: object

**Success (200):** Returns updated definition
**Error (404):** Definition not found

Delete an evaluation definition.

**Permission:** OWNER only

**Success (204):** No content
**Error (404):** Definition not found

item.name: Runs

request.description:
Create a new evaluation run to test agent versions.

**Permission:** OWNER or ADMIN

**Body:**
- `name`: Optional, max 255 characters
- `configSnapshot`: Required object containing:
  - `agentVersionIds`: Required, array of version IDs (min 1)
  - `datasetId`: Required, dataset to evaluate against
  - `evaluationDefinitionIds`: Required, array of definition IDs (min 1)

**Success (201):** Returns run object

item.description: Evaluation run operations for testing agent performance.
Evaluation system endpoints for defining evaluation criteria and running evaluations on agents.
